name: Image Compressor
description: Truly lossless image compression for PNG and JPEG. Outputs to a sibling 'compressed/' folder, preserves filenames + format. Picks up Finder selection automatically.
author: Coco

subtitle.en: PNG + JPEG · lossless via imagemin · uses Finder selection
subtitle.zh: PNG + JPEG · imagemin 真无损 · 自动读取访达选中
